channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kiros ousts 15-term Colorado U.S. Rep. DeGette
item.description: Progressive challenger Melat Kiros achieved a major upset, defeating 15-term incumbent Diana DeGette in the Democratic primary on Tuesday.

item.title: Phil Weiser defeats Michael Bennet in Colorado governor primary upset
item.description: Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser won the Democratic primary for governor, defeating Senator Michael Bennet.

item.title: Harris contacts Mamdani and pro-Palestinian activists ahead of 2028
item.description: Kamala Harris privately called New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani and held meetings with pro-Palestinian activists.

item.title: Trump sides with MAHA in tense Oval Office dispute over pesticides
item.description: An Oval Office meeting saw a heated clash over pesticides, with Trump backing the MAHA position.
